name: Detectify
description: External attack surface management and application security testing platform providing continuous monitoring, automated scanning, and crowdsource-powered vulnerability detection

actions.name: List Root Assets
actions.description: Retrieve all root-level assets (domains) being monitored

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset by token

parameters.name: asset_token
parameters.description: The unique token identifier of the asset

actions.name: List Scan Profiles
actions.description: Retrieve all application scan profiles for the team

actions.name: Get Scan Profile Details
actions.description: Retrieve details and settings for a specific scan profile

parameters.name: scan_profile_token
parameters.description: The unique token of the scan profile

actions.name: Start Scan
actions.description: Initiate a new application scan for a specific scan profile

parameters.name: scan_profile_token
parameters.description: The unique token of the scan profile to start scanning

actions.name: Get Scan Status
actions.description: Retrieve the current status of an application scan for a scan profile

parameters.name: scan_profile_token
parameters.description: The unique token of the scan profile

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings from both surface monitoring and application scans

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (high, medium, low, information)

actions.name: List Subdomains
actions.description: Retrieve discovered subdomains for a specific root asset

parameters.name: asset_token
parameters.description: The unique token of the root asset
